principle: A later key is evaluated only when every earlier key is equal and fully known for both candidates.

keys.expression: exclude zero-cast candidates and every candidate with a projected black-pillar collision or direct physical black effect
maximize the minimum next-turn spell charge, then maximize total next-turn charges
0 if crocoburio_advance, 1 if neutral, 2 if unknown; black-adverse candidates were already excluded
negative count of orthogonally adjacent walkable_confirmed or walkable_observed cells at finalCell
lexicographic comparison of action tuples [spellOrdinal,targetKindOrdinal,x,y,pillarId], repeated per action; empty sequence is []

sequenceKeyFormat: Display signature remains <spell>@<target-kind>:<x>,<y>:<pillar-id-or-dash>; comparison uses parsed typed tuples, not raw string ordering.
notes: At least one movement cast is mandatory every round; standing still is not a candidate.
Projected black-pillar collisions and direct physical black effects are hard exclusions, never ranking fallbacks.
A white collision is optional. Among equally short safe sequences it improves resource resilience.
Pillar-based next-turn mobility is not ranked because pillar positions change each turn.
Unknown future resources block only when cast count ties and the resource key is reached.
